segments.text: The Mighty One, God, Yahweh, speaks, and calls the earth from sunrise to sunset.
Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God shines out.
Our God comes, and does not keep silent. A fire devours before him.
It is very stormy around him.
He calls to the heavens above, to the earth, that he may judge his people:
Gather my saints together to me, those who have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The heavens shall declare his righteousness, for God himself is judge. Selah.
Hear, my people, and I will speak. Israel, I will testify against you. I am God, your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I don’t rebuke you for your sacrifices. Your burnt offerings are continually before me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have no need for a bull from your stall, nor male goats from your pens.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For every animal of the forest is mine, and the livestock on a thousand hills.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I know all the birds of the mountains. The wild animals of the field are mine.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If I were hungry, I would not tell you, for the world is mine, and all that is in it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Will I eat the meat of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Offer to God the sacrifice of thanksgiving. Pay your vows to the Most High.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Call on me in the day of trouble. I will deliver you, and you will honor me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But to the wicked God says,

What right do you have to declare my statutes, 
that you have taken my covenant on your lips,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
since you hate instruction, 
and throw my words behind you?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When you saw a thief, you consented with him, and have participated with adulterers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You give your mouth to evil. Your tongue frames deceit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You sit and speak against your brother. You slander your own mother’s son.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
You have done these things, and I kept silent. You thought that I was just like you. 
I will rebuke you, and accuse you in front of your eyes.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “Now consider this, you who forget God, lest I tear you into pieces, and there be no one to deliver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Whoever offers the sacrifice of thanksgiving glorifies me, and prepares his way so that I will show God’s salvation to him.
segments.speaker: God
